design_philosophy.vibe: Warm, supportive, non-judgmental, grounded. The app must feel like a sanctuary, not a hospital.
key_traits: Generous spacing (p-8, p-12) to give data breathing room
Optical clarity with subtle borders rather than heavy drop shadows

headings.usage: Use for all large text, streak counters, and dashboard section titles. Do not exceed text-6xl for hero.

body.usage: Use for diary entries, glossary text, and dietary metrics.

colors.description: Earthy tones. Warm sand, terracotta, sage, deep forest, cream.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use p-6 to p-8 inside cards. Add generous breathing room between sections (py-12 or py-16).
layout_and_spacing.card_style: Flat background (bg-card), 1px subtle border (border-border), no harsh drop shadows. Use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for a friendly, approachable feel.

components.buttons: rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 active:translate-y-0 shadow-sm
components.inputs: bg-transparent border-b-2 border-x-0 border-t-0 border-border rounded-none px-0 focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-primary transition-colors h-12
components.progress_rings: Use SVG circles. protein: stroke-primary, salt: stroke-terracotta, water: stroke-sky. Round caps.
components.sliders: Use Shadcn Slider. Customize with thick tracks and primary color thumb. Crucial for mood rating (1-10).
components.cards: Neumorphic soft clay look. Avoid stark white boxes. Use bg-[#F4F1EA].

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and darken border color.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Fade in with a slight upward translation.
motion_and_interaction.progress_bars: Animate width/stroke-dashoffset slowly (duration-1000 ease-out) to emphasize steady progress.

hero_background.description: Calm mountain sunrise over water. Use for the login/welcome page. Apply bg-black/20 to bg-black/30 overlay for text contrast.

food_label_placeholder.description: Healthy warm food ingredients. Use as an empty state or placeholder in the Food Label Reader section.

iconography.style: stroke-[1.5] for a lighter, more organic feel. Avoid heavy, chunky icons.

testing.requirement: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case format.

page_specific_instructions.auth_landing: Asymmetric split screen on desktop. Calm nature image on one side with a motivational quote. Warm login/register form on the other with generous padding.
page_specific_instructions.dashboard: Bento grid layout. Hero card: Sobriety streak counter spanning full width or 2 columns with large typography (text-5xl). 3 smaller cards for diet rings (Protein min 140mg, Salt max 2mg, Water max 1.5L). A wide card for today's mood.
page_specific_instructions.daily_diary: Vertical timeline layout. Each entry is a soft tactile card. Group by date. Include 1-10 mood rating and tags (rounded-full bg-primary/10 text-primary).
page_specific_instructions.diet_tracker: Visual focus on max/min limits. Protein is a 'fill up' progress bar. Salt and Water are 'don't overflow' bars. Emphasize earthy colors.
page_specific_instructions.blood_tests: Manual entry form + Recharts. Line charts with smooth curves (type='monotone'). Tooltips must have dark earthy background. Plot markers like ALT, AST, GGT, bilirubin.
page_specific_instructions.food_label_reader: Photo upload UI with dashed border (border-primary). Once uploaded, show extracted nutrition data in a neat table before confirming.
page_specific_instructions.weekly_goals: List view with oversized checkboxes. Strikethrough text when completed with a subtle color fade.
page_specific_instructions.glossary: List view with alphabetical sticky headers. Search bar at top. High contrast text for easy reading of medical/recovery terms.
